In partnership with POIDH  ·  IYKYK
Technology  ·  Community  ·  Culture

Weekly video journalism bounties.
Your phone. Your city. Your story.

We Them Media is the platform at the intersection of technology, community, and culture — with creators actively contributing from Nigeria, Kenya, and North America. Every week we post a journalism prompt as an on-chain bounty through POIDH, in partnership with IYKYK, a decentralized journalism network. Film it, submit it, get featured and paid if it lands.

This week’s bounty $100 in Arbitrum ETH

youtube.com/@WeThemMediaHQ  ·  See who we are
How to participate
⚠ You need a wallet with ETH on Arbitrum to submit. New to crypto? Set up a free wallet at metamask.io and bridge ETH to Arbitrum at bridge.arbitrum.io. A small amount is enough to cover the submission fee.
1
Find this week’s bounty
Browse active prompts at poidh.xyz/a/wethemmedia — one question, your lens, your city.
2
Film it and submit on POIDH
Phone camera. One to three minutes. Upload your video directly on the bounty page before Sunday, April 6 at 12pm PST.
3
Post it and loop in the community
Share your clip and invite all three communities into your post at once.
Instagram Add @we_them_media and @poidhxyz as collaborators — your post reaches all three audiences simultaneously.
X Tag @WeThemMediaHQ — we amplify across the WTM and POIDH networks.
Telegram Join the community at t.me/+0gAjqeEWnZ4yMWIx — see what others are making, get feedback before you submit.
4
Get featured and earn $100
Winner selected live on Sunday Service every week. $100 in Arbitrum ETH paid on-chain directly to your wallet. Your clip travels across six platforms with your name on it.
What you tap into

You do not need to be a journalist. You do not need a format. You need one honest answer from one real person to one simple question. We take it from there.
